case_title: ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE VS ATTAR, MAZOUD (UOMO) OWNER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $847.00 FILED BY ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT ATTAR, MAZOUD (UOMO) OWNER VOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC. $847.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $897.00, VOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC. REPLACES MAZOUD ATTAR AS DEFT. MAZOUD ATTAR IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT VOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26982, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ATTAR, MAZOUD (UOMO) OWNER VOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26982 ON 9/25/02 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ATTAR, MAZOUD (UOMO) OWNER
